campaign: BC3 gap decomposition — quantify GEMM efficiency vs epilogue share
finding: the >=1.5x claim was always above the physical roofline; the actual fusion ceiling collapses to 1.085x at FFN-shape because cuBLAS-3 is 92% GEMM (only 8% bias+GELU at large M*N).

interpretation.1.5x_target_diagnosis: ALWAYS unphysical above shape 256x256x256. At FFN-scale (4096x11008x4096), the GEMM consumes 92.14% of cuBLAS-3 wall; epilogue (bias_add + gelu kernels) is only 7.86%. Eliminating epilogue entirely = 1.085x speedup at best.
interpretation.honest_closure_target: ratio (cublas3/fused) approaching the fusion ceiling. Per-shape ceilings: 1.32x (256) -> 1.29x (512) -> 1.12x (1024) -> 1.06x (2048) -> 1.08x (4096) -> 1.085x (FFN). The original >=1.5x gate was above the physical roofline at every shape M*N >= 1024.
interpretation.next_wedge_revised: since fusion ceiling is small for large shapes, the BIG win is not epilogue-fusion. The big win is FOR ATTENTION (BC4) where the structural pattern has heavier inner work (online softmax + 2 GEMMs) and tighter HBM dependency; and for SHAPE-PARAMETERIZED activations where the inner GEMM is small (small-batch inference, MoE expert dispatch with K=4096 but M small).
interpretation.methodology_lesson: instrument-first methodology (feedback_instrument_first_methodology): cheap GEMM-only oracle quantified the roofline-vs-claim gap BEFORE a heavyweight N204-toolkit-transplant attempt would have been spent chasing a 13.57x gap that physically tops out at 1.085x. The cheap-first oracle saved a multi-cycle campaign that would have been bounded by physics.
